title: while I agree with his general thinking about how we’ll rethink home design, seems optimistic to think that a meaningful percentage of homes would be redesigned in a 5-10 yr period

content.summary: while I agree with his general thinking about how we’ll rethink home design, seems optimistic to think that a meaningful percentage of homes would be redesigned in a 5-10 yr period TBPN (@tbpn) . @mcuban says humanoid robots won't last more than 5-10 years. Instead, we'll "design the house to fit the robot, and design the robot to fit the house." "You could create a house where the pantry, the refrigerator, and the washing machines were hidden behind the garage, if you even have a garage. That way you could redesign the house so that all the living space was for people." Video — https://nitter.net/tbpn/status/2034741081108258895#m
